blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
